recommendations.title: The Young Lions
recommendations.overview: The lives of three young men, a German and two Americans, during WWII.

recommendations.title: Crossfire
recommendations.overview: A man is murdered, apparently by one of a group of soldiers just out of the army. But which one? And why?

recommendations.title: Murder, My Sweet
recommendations.overview: After being hired to find an ex-con's former girlfriend, Philip Marlowe is drawn into a deeply complex web of mystery and deceit.

recommendations.title: The Caine Mutiny
recommendations.overview: When a US Naval captain shows signs of mental instability that jeopardize his ship, the first officer relieves him of command and faces court martial for mutiny.

recommendations.title: Mirage
recommendations.overview: After a blackout in his office building, accountant David Stillwell emerges outside to find out a man he did not know either jumped or was pushed out a window to his death — and that he can't remember the past two years of his life. Enlisting the hel

recommendations.title: Blazing Saddles
recommendations.overview: A town—where everyone seems to be named Johnson—stands in the way of the railroad. In order to grab their land, robber baron Hedley Lamarr sends his henchmen to make life in the town unbearable. After the sheriff is killed, the town demands a new she

recommendations.title: Tombstone
recommendations.overview: Legendary marshal Wyatt Earp, now a weary gunfighter, joins his brothers Morgan and Virgil to pursue their collective fortune in the thriving mining town of Tombstone. But Earp is forced to don a badge again and get help from his notorious pal Doc Ho

recommendations.title: The Gunfighter
recommendations.overview: In the tradition of classic westerns, a narrator sets up the story of a lone gunslinger who walks into a saloon. However, the people in this saloon can hear the narrator and the narrator may just be a little bit bloodthirsty.

recommendations.title: Johnny Guitar
recommendations.overview: On the outskirts of town, the hard-nosed Vienna owns a saloon frequented by the undesirables of the region, including Dancin' Kid and his gang. Another patron of Vienna's establishment is Johnny Guitar, a former gunslinger and her lover. When a heist

recommendations.title: Hell on the Border
recommendations.overview: In the late 1800s, legendary marshal Bass Reeves sets out on the trail of notorious outlaw Bob Dozier.
